title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 109.110 - Transcript to be evidence, when
text:
109.110.  Transcript to be evidence, when. — After any book or record so transcribed is examined by the judge or justices of such courts, respectively, ordering the same to be transcribed, and he or they shall make an order on the records of the court that the same is correct, the same faith and credit shall be given to the transcript that the book or record transcribed was entitled.
(RSMo 1939 § 3634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3244; 1919 § 10606; 1909 § 10417
